answer: The work is Traité de la propriété (Treatise on Property), Volume I, by Charles Comte, published in 1834. The first sentence of the introduction (preface) is: "Had the work I publish today been brought to light four or five years ago, the time at which I intended for it to appear, I would have had no need, before entering upon the subject, to address my readers directly to observe that it was the continuation of another treatise I published in 1826 and 1827."
